message:
test(db,tools): add 50 tests for s3fifo, tracking, and metrics modules

- s3fifo.rs: 12 new tests (26→38) — capacity edge cases, len invariant,
  ghost overflow, string keys, mixed access patterns, insert-after-clear
- tracking.rs: 26 new tests (43→69) — short SQL, tab/CR delimiters,
  serde roundtrips, unknown table regex path, time accumulation,
  snapshot deserialization, insert-or-replace, update priority
- metrics.rs: 12 new tests (12→24) — tool index, latency recording,
  serde roundtrips, meta coverage, slow tool threshold, debug impls

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
